text:
やあ、ちょうどよかった！
今度は、もっと大きなエネミーとの
戦闘記録をとらせてくれ！

ふははっ！
そんな不思議そうな顔をするな。

実はな、戦闘部司令のくせに
部下への戦闘指導が雑すぎると
言われてしまってな。

少しぐらい、資料にまとめろと
マリア姐さんに厳命されていたが
ずっとサボ……忙しくてな！

そこで、頼む！
エネミーの部位を破壊してから
倒してみせ

Ah, just the person I wanted to see. I'd like
you to help me write up another combat log,
only with an even more massive enemy
this time!

Mwahaha!
Oh, don't give me that look!

The truth is, though I am the Combat Bureau
Commander, I've been told I'm quite awful at
any sort of combat commanding.

Ms. Maria been trying to get me to study and
improve myself, but I've just been putting it
off... Er, because I'm so busy, of course!

But you will make for fine reference! I was
hoping you would go take down these enemies.
Busting up some of their parts, first, mind!
